scripts.build:api: npm install && npx prisma generate --schema=./prisma/schema.prisma && npm run build -w apps/api
scripts.build:prod: npm install && npx prisma generate --schema=./prisma/schema.prisma && npx prisma migrate deploy --schema=./prisma/schema.prisma && npm run build -w apps/api
scripts.start:prod: npx prisma migrate deploy --schema=./prisma/schema.prisma && node apps/api/dist/main
